title: 4-Pack Organic Food Bowl Covers - Unbleached Reusable 100% Cotton Stretchy Cloth Covers - Perfect Fit for Small to Medium Bowls (5.5"-8")
features: Hell Blues reusable bowl covers are ideal replacements for disposable plastic wrap and foil.
Use these covers to cover the rising dough for bread making it easy to proof. Great for covering large salad bowls, casseroles, and for brewing kombucha.

Each cotton cover is reversible, durable, strong and is made from 100% organic unbleached cotton.. The durable and elastic edges of the covers stretch well and grip the bowl, your food will always be in the bowl and will not fall out anywhere. The food will remain tasty and insect-free.

Set of 4 Bowl Covers for Bowls ranging from 5.5" - 8" . The durable and elastic edges of the covers stretch well and grip the bowl, your food will always be in the bowl and will not fall out anywhere. The food will remain tasty and insect-free.
HB Bowl cover is 100% Chemical Free - No Dye , No Colors - Just 100% Natural . Reusable, Machine wash between uses and lay flat to dry
A zero waste product is an easy and convenient way to minimize your environmental impact and keep you healthy by not putting your food into plastic bags!
description: Product Description Hell blues bowl covers are made out of cotton and are designed to be breathable, so as to not let condensation and moisture build up in your dish. The cotton cover molds to the size of your dish, and the elastic will help secure it into place. No more aluminum foil and plastic wraps, opt for these beautiful, washable and reusable bowl covers. Eliminate messy food transfers when refrigerating and reheating. No more tirelessly washing dish after dish. These covers are great to keep leftovers and fresh food covered in their serving bowls. Perfect to use for both indoor and outdoor gatherings. HB bowl cover are available in five different measuring diameter (pack of 4) : small for covering 2.5"-5" bowls, medium for covering 4"-6.5", large for covering 5.5"-8" bowls, x-large for 6.5"-10" bowls and xx-large for 7.5"-10.5" bowls. Individually Handmade & designed specifically for the purpose of using with room temp ferments (such as milk kefir, water kefir, kombucha, sourdough, ginger beer, and yogurts like viili & caspian). NOTE : Bowl covers can be wiped clean, or machine washed and dried. Bowl covers are not for use in the microwave or oven. Just wash with cold water on gentle cycle & line dry. Avoid fabric softeners to prolong life and use! These bowl covers are convenient to use - just put the cover on your container and the elastic will hold it. 100% unbleached cotton has a natural appearance, is nice to touch and breathable, safe for your health and environment. Perfect kitchen essential to reduce the amount of unnecessary plastic waste in your home and to keep your food fresh and full of flavor. A fantastic alternative to cling film or foil, these sustainable, stretch bowl covers can be used in a variety of ways in your kitchen. Give them as a sustainable gift to your mom, sister, daughter & all your zero waste friends. Even to the ones that are not convinced yet. They will change their mind as soon as they have experienced the comfort of these multipurpose covers.
